SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
HorizontalSegment
Horizontal segment, with the y constant We stock the left extremity in the PST
HorizontalSegmentTest
 
Point
Represent a point in R^2, a point is going to be used in a segment
PointTest
 
PST
Abstract Priority Search Tree.
PstH
Priority Search Tree for horizontal segments.
PstNode
Represents a node in a Priority Search Tree (PST).
PSTTest
 
PstV
Priority Search Tree for vertical segments.
Segment
 
SegmentFileParser
Class use to parse a file and use this metric for the windowing exercises
SegmentFileParser.ParseResult
Represents the result of parsing a file containing segment information.
TestWindowing
Entry point of the windowing application.
VerticalSegment
Vertical segment with the x constant We stock the bottom extremity into the pst
VerticalSegmentTest
 
Window
Represents a rectangular query window defined by its bounds in the Cartesian plane: [xMin, xMax] × [yMin, yMax].
WindowerEngine
Engine that applies windowing queries to a set of axis-aligned segments.
WindowerEngineTest
 
WindowingController
Controls the user interface for visualizing axis-aligned segments and applying windowing queries.
WindowTest
